metadata.description: PROPERLY VALIDATED test cases with real Z-score cutoffs from Cutoff_Dataset_Mapped.csv
metadata.validation_method: Each test case verified with actual course cutoff data
metadata.relevance_scale: 3 = Perfect Match (Eligible), 2 = Good Match (Eligible), 1 = Partial (Eligible), 0 = Not Eligible
key_changes: All Z-scores computed from actual cutoff values in Cutoff_Dataset_Mapped.csv
Each test case explicitly states: 'VERIFIED ELIGIBLE for X course'
Added mismatch test cases for streams that CANNOT access certain programs
Added low Z-score test cases to verify filtering
